# Lennin Ibarra

> Senior Frontend Engineer based in Bogotá, Colombia, currently working at Monks (Media.Monks), with over 10 years of experience building modern and scalable web applications.

## About

Lennin Ibarra is a passionate frontend developer with over a decade of experience building modern and scalable web applications. He specializes in React, TypeScript, and frontend architectures that prioritize user experience and performance.

- Location: Bogotá, Colombia
- Experience: 10+ years
- Projects: 50+
- Companies: 6+
- Technologies: 20+

## Core Skills

**Frontend:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Vue.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion

**Backend:** Node.js, Python, REST APIs, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB

**Tools:** Git, Docker, AWS, Vercel, Figma, Jest

**Soft Skills:** Technical leadership, Mentoring, Communication, Teamwork, Problem solving, Professional English

## Professional Experience

### Front-End Architect — Monks
**Period:** Nov 2025 - Present

Led the refactoring of DITU video player for Caracol TV, transforming a monolithic component into a scalable modular architecture.

Key highlights:
- Modular architecture with 13+ modules
- Complete unit testing suite
- Analytics integration with NPAW + Google IMA
- Reduced production regressions
- Technical documentation and onboarding
- Profile management optimization
- Legacy code cleanup
- Firebase Analytics integration
- Yarn Workspaces monorepo setup

### Front-End Architect — Hoitsu
**Period:** Jul 2025 - Nov 2025

Developed web application for designing BPMN 2.0 diagrams with Next.js 16 and React 19, integrating interactive visual editor and real-time GraphQL communication.

Key highlights:
- BPMN 2.0 editor with bpmn-js
- GraphQL + real-time sync
- UI with shadcn/ui + Tailwind
- ES/EN multilanguage system
- Secure OAuth authentication
- Global state with Zustand
- Automatic TypeScript types

### Front-End Architect — Comfama
**Period:** Jul 2025 - Aug 2025

Led frontend architecture with GatsbyJS and React, designing reusable components and custom hooks. Integrated AI tools to boost productivity.

Key highlights:
- Scalable GatsbyJS architecture
- Custom React hooks
- Decoupled API services
- Unit testing with Jest
- AI integration (Claude + Warp)
- CI/CD with strict TypeScript

### Front-End Architect — IT Globers
**Period:** Jun 2024 - Mar 2025

Developed user interfaces for VTEX IO e-commerce platforms, implementing custom React components for high-traffic digital channels.

Key highlights:
- React + TypeScript interfaces
- Global state with Redux Toolkit
- Material UI + Tailwind CSS
- Production VTEX IO e-commerce
- Firebase Authentication
- VTEX CMS catalog management

### Front-End Architect — Indra
**Period:** Apr 2021 - Apr 2024

Led refactoring of compras.tigo.com.co portal, implementing accessible dynamic forms and Google Calendar API integration.

Key highlights:
- Portal compras.tigo.com.co
- Dynamic UX/UI forms
- Redux + react-big-calendar
- Full Google Calendar API integration
- Multilevel i18n system
- Redux Toolkit + selectors

### Front-End Architect — Indigenous Council
**Period:** Sep 2020 - Jan 2021

Designed and developed React web application for project management of indigenous organizations, with company creation, roles, document upload and automated reports.

Key highlights:
- React project management app
- Redux Toolkit + Auth0
- Figma design system
- Automated reports
- Auth0 login/logout flows
- Forms with validation

### Front-End Architect & Lead — ParqueSoft Nariño
**Period:** Jan 2014 - Aug 2020

Implemented technology solutions for government: citizen hotline #195, PQRS system and INFORMANDO citizen participation platform with geolocation.

Key highlights:
- Hotline #195 Pasto City Hall
- PQRS government system
- INFORMANDO platform
- VOIP Asterisk + PHP system
- BPM with Processmaker
- Digital Ocean infrastructure

## Featured Projects

### DITU - Streaming Platform
Streaming platform for Caracol TV developed at Media.Monks. Modern architecture with React and performance optimization for millions of users.
Technologies: SolidJS, Tizen, NPAW

### BPMN Process Editor
Visual business process editor for Hoitsu. Allows designing and automating workflows with intuitive drag & drop.
Technologies: Next.js, GraphQL, GitHub

### Tigo E-commerce
E-commerce platform for Tigo Colombia developed at Indra. Optimized purchase flows and integration with multiple payment gateways.
Technologies: jQuery, HTML, CSS

### Romance Relax E-commerce
Online store developed with VTEX IO for IT Globers. Personalized shopping experience and high performance.
Technologies: VTEX IO, React, E-commerce

### Informando - Citizen Participation
Citizen participation application developed for ParqueSoft Nariño. Allows citizens to report and track local issues.
Technologies: Ushahidi, Google Maps, Mobile, Government

### Government PQRD System
Petitions, Complaints, Claims and Reports system for government entities. Complete management of the citizen service cycle.
Technologies: ProcessMaker, Digital Ocean, CentOS

## Education

### University Studies — Universidad de Nariño
**Location:** Pasto, Colombia | **Date:** December 2010

Solid academic foundation in software engineering fundamentals, data structures, databases, and systems development.

### Advanced Architect and Developer in BPM — Processmaker Certification
**Location:** Bogotá, Colombia | **Date:** July 2014

Specialized certification in advanced business process management (BPM) architecture and development under BPMN 2.0 standards.

### Platzi Master — Intensive Web Development Program
**Date:** March 2020

Intensive training program focused on modern web technologies and development best practices.

## Why Lennin Ibarra

- 10+ years of continuous delivery across government, telecom, media, and e-commerce
- Built and shipped DITU, a streaming platform serving Caracol TV users in production
- Led architecture on projects ranging from citizen-services platforms to video players
- Shipped production code in React, SolidJS, Vue, VTEX IO — not framework-dependent
- Available for senior/architect roles or technical consulting, remote or Latin America
